items.title: Laura Veirs – “Pulse”
items.summary: In May, Laura Veirs announced her new album Temple Songs and shared "Flying Into Darkness." Now, the Portland indie-folk singer-songwriter is releasing "Pulse," which is a very beautiful song with a very amusing music video. The post Laura Veirs – “Pulse” appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Nelson Comes To Visit Announce New Album We Emit A Visible Light That Vanishes When We Die: Hear “I Was On Fire (But Now I’m Fine)”
items.summary: In recent years we've been following the collaborations between Columbus-based Superdestroyer and Cleveland's own (Leave) Nelson B, a string of computerized emo releases under the banner of Nelson Comes To Visit.

items.title: Slothrust – “Burn The Deck”
items.summary: Slothrust recently announced the Dystopian Theatre Tour, a run of US shows with Um, Jennifer and the Velveteers. To celebrate, the band is sharing a new track called "Burn The Deck." The post Slothrust – “Burn The Deck” appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: How The Mars Volta Built A Live LP With Its Fans
items.summary: For most bands, a live album is a souvenir. For the Mars Volta, it’s an existential conundrum. The El Paso, Tx.-born rock institution has spent more than two decades building a reputation on the idea that no performance should ever be the same twice. And, since 2004, guitarist, producer and de facto architect Omar Rodríguez-López […]

items.title: System Of A Down’s Serj Tankian says “fuck you” to Netanyahu regime for “using our [Armenian] history, our genocide, our pain to their political advantage”
